description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 12, 2025 at 11:32 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a suspended wire on Main Street near W. 37th Place.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound in the left lane on Main Street when it approached a wire apparently tied on one end to a utility 
pole and being held up by a pedestrian on the west sidewalk of Main Street, such that the wire was suspended low across all lanes of Main 
Street. The Waymo proceeded straight, striking the suspended wire and then driving over it. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Waymo is reporting this crash under Request No. 1 of Standing General Order 2021-01 because a vehicle involved was towed away. 
Waymo may supplement or correct its reporting with additional information as it may become available.
Print
Clear Form
